assignments.name: filesFound
assignments.value: ={{ $items('Listar Arquivos Drive').map(i => i.json || {}).filter(f => f.id || f.name || f.mimeType || f.webViewLink).length }}

assignments.name: filesJson
assignments.value: ={{ JSON.stringify($items('Listar Arquivos Drive').map(i => i.json || {}).filter(f => f.id || f.name || f.mimeType || f.webViewLink).map(f => ({ id: f.id, name: f.name, mimeType: f.mimeType, webViewLink: f.webViewLink, modifiedTime: f.modifiedTime, size: f.size }))) }}
